auditor_note: Orchestrator-composed from narrative-auditor sub-agent inline verdict (agent aa6fb84acf82404e2 — write-denied by sandbox). The auditor performed the full scan in-memory and delivered claim counts and key deltas verbatim. The 61-claim table is condensed here to the new/changed entries; the 57 R22 carry-forward NC ids are unchanged and not re-listed.

new_claims_R23.re_read: §12 of SPEC.md names cross-origin iframe 'outline only' as a behavioral promise. grep -n iframe pinscope/src/runtime/PinScope.tsx → 0 hits. markCrossOriginFrames in src/runtime/utils/iframe-overlay.ts exists but has 0 runtime consumers. AC-061 verify.kind: 'manual' env: 'browser' BLOCKED — a manual check that never runs cannot fail when the claim is violated, so AC-061 does NOT cover this claim per the coverage rule. **This is the round's one blocking_finding (uncovered_unsatisfied).** P3 severity.

AC-062 vitest-tag test in edge-utils.test.ts imports `elementRect` from `src/runtime/utils/rect-math.ts` and asserts SVG-aware viewport-space rect calculation. The claim is code-satisfied AND AC-covered. **DELETION-SAFETY WARNING for R-23-06**: rect-math.ts deletion would break AC-062 import → CLOSED→FAIL regression.

SPEC §13 perf table lists 'Selection update < 16 ms' as a critical perf budget. No AC covers it; no perf test measures it. NEW candidate AC-NEW-23 (P1 severity) — strengthen by minting AC for SPEC bump.
SPEC §13 perf table. No AC, no perf test. NEW candidate AC-NEW-24 (P3 severity).

blocking_findings.description: §12 cross-origin iframe outline-only behavior is a normative SPEC claim with NO covering AC (AC-061 is manual+BLOCKED) AND code_satisfied:false (markCrossOriginFrames has 0 runtime consumers). The helper exists but is never invoked in production HUD. R-23-06 plans to delete iframe-overlay.ts entirely; that deletion would move the gap from 'dormant helper exists' to 'no code exists at all' — both states violate the claim. **Either wire the helper into PinScopeHud and add a covering AC (likely env=browser BLOCKED), or propose a SPEC bump removing the §12 cross-origin-outline clause.** Pending user decision.

strengthen_proposals.current: single size-limit entry { limit: '80 KB' } — checks 80KB min only
strengthen_proposals.proposed: split into two size-limit entries: { name: 'runtime (dev, minified)', limit: '80 KB' } AND { name: 'runtime (dev, gzipped)', limit: '25 KB', gzip: true } — covers the full §13 80KB-min + 25KB-gz dual budget. Paired with F-23-01 R-23-01 KB-assertion script.

carry_forward_R22_unchanged: All 57 R22 NC ids retain status. NC-12-02 (>500 pins → 30fps throttle + skip <16×16 badges) remains code_satisfied:true after R-21-03 closure.

deletion_safety_warnings.warning: DO NOT DELETE — AC-062 vitest-tag test in edge-utils.test.ts imports elementRect. Deletion → CLOSED → FAIL regression.
DO NOT DELETE — AC-076 vitest-tag test in screenshot.test.ts imports captureScreenshot. Deletion → CLOSED → FAIL regression.

SAFE TO DELETE — AC-061 is manual+BLOCKED (cannot ever assert in node env). iframe-overlay.test.ts can be deleted with the source. Note this WORSENS NF-23-01 (no code AND no AC for §12 cross-origin claim) — pair the deletion with a SPEC-bump proposal.
